reportSummary: Every attempted click (Trending, Latest News) was intercepted by a Cloudflare “Just a moment…” security interstitial, so no Nairaland content or internal navigation could be reached. Waiting multiple times produced no visible progress; the page title stayed “Just a moment…”. Click feedback existed (URL/title changed quickly), but the experience was a dead end. This is a run limitation caused by the security layer, not proof the underlying site is slow or broken.
